[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111010110 6
1 000111001 4
2 110111111 8
3 111111000 6
4 101101100 5
5 110011100 5
6 000001101 3
7 100000000 1

01 10 110010000 3
12 21 000010000 1
23 32 000111001 4 match 1

45 54 101101000 4
56 65 100001100 3
67 76 000001100 2
70 07 000000000 a

02 20 000010000 1
13 31 110010110 5
24 42 000111000 3
35 53 100101100 4

57 75 000001100 2
60 06 110010000 3
71 17 000000100 1

36 63 110011100 5 match 5
47 74 000001000 1
50 05 100000000 1 match 7
61 16 110010100 4
72 27 000001001 2

26 62 000011000 2
37 73 000001101 3 match 6
